context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct Meta Graph API version, schedules HOURLY feed sync, uses the Catalog Batch API (items_batch endpoint) for real-time updates, correctly identifies the 60-day token expiry and sets up refresh, and uses retailer_id (SKU) in batch update requests.

checklist.name: Graph API v18.0
checklist.description: All Meta API URLs in the code use 'graph.facebook.com/v18.0/' (not an older or newer version like v17.0 or v19.0)

checklist.name: HOURLY feed interval
checklist.description: The feed schedule sets interval to 'HOURLY' when calling the product_feeds endpoint (not 'DAILY' or 'WEEKLY')

checklist.name: items_batch endpoint for updates
checklist.description: Real-time product updates use the '/items_batch' endpoint with POST method (not re-uploading the full feed or using a different update mechanism)

checklist.name: UPDATE method in batch request
checklist.description: The batch request body includes 'method: UPDATE' within the requests array item

checklist.name: retailer_id uses SKU
checklist.description: The items_batch request identifies the product via 'retailer_id' set to the variant's SKU value

checklist.name: Batch updates price and availability
checklist.description: The data object in the batch update request includes both the updated price (formatted as decimal + ' USD') and availability ('in stock' / 'out of stock')

checklist.name: 60-day token expiry mentioned
checklist.description: ARCHITECTURE.md or token-management.ts contains a comment or explanation noting that Meta long-lived tokens expire after 60 days

checklist.name: Token refresh automation
checklist.description: scheduleTokenRefresh() sets up an automated recurring process (cron, setInterval, or similar) to refresh the token before it expires — not a manual reminder

checklist.name: owned_product_catalogs endpoint used
checklist.description: createMetaCatalog() POSTs to the '{META_BUSINESS_ID}/owned_product_catalogs' endpoint to create the catalog

checklist.name: product_feeds endpoint for feed registration
checklist.description: addFeedToCatalog() POSTs to '{catalogId}/product_feeds' endpoint to register the feed URL

checklist.name: item_type PRODUCT_ITEM in batch
checklist.description: The items_batch request body includes 'item_type: PRODUCT_ITEM'
